We shared research of different companies, and though our neighbours went with someone else based referrals from trusted sources and had happy outcomes, we waited a bit longer and went with Boston Roofing. Why did we do that?

Carlo is a no-nonsense, very direct, friendly and collaborative owner with decades of roofing experience and a passion to educate you on the intricacies rooftop engineering in a way that makes you feel respected and enlightened. It was because of Carlo that we entrusted his crew to install CertainTeed Landmark Pro Max Def Espresso shingles on our house. It is a family-run business and they take pride in the products they offer, their workmanship, and their carefully selected crew - many of whom also have decades of experience.

Even though Boston Roofing knew we would be elsewhere on vacation, they showed up to our house on time and were incredibly detailed in the installation.  They worked around obstacles like our leafguard system to complete the install in 2-3 days. Instead of rushing the job, they took extra care to replace our vents, ensure proper full coverage of underlayment materials, and to cut each sheet of shingles with precision and accuracy - ensuring eligibility for our CertainTeed 50 year roof system warranty. These details aren't even from me - they're from my neighbours, who watched carefully, asked questions, and geniuinely appreciated the crew's attention to detail, friendliness, and clean-up. One neighbour even went out and got the crew coffees b/c of the rapport that the crew had had built up with the neighbour over the course of the installation.

This company is neither the cheapest nor the fastest. I do believe they are the absolute best, that they will work in your best interest to resolve hiccups that come up, that you won't regret the investment, and that these factors make them worth the wait (approx. one month for us). My roof looks fantastic and I have reasonable expectation that their work will hold up. We love our roof, and would not hesitate to use Boston Roofing again.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We had an emergency roof repair and it was dealt with right away. We then redid our roof entirely. Great work from Mike, Steve, Mark, Sean and Owen! Friendly and professional and they care! Thank you so much for all your hard work. We are extremely pleased with the results. Sara and Amanda, thank you for always being there to answer our questions. Outstanding customer service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amira Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWp-TENJM6uvCjK9LJ9MbATXFfo_Hi-b6ox2Z8D5erEf_r3fdxmDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I wish I could rate Principal Roofing in two parts, because our experience was split. Their sales rep Dean deserves 5 stars — he was attentive, knowledgeable, and even improved our home’s venting, which has made a noticeable difference in temperature regulation.

Unfortunately, everything beyond Dean was frustrating. After the crew finished, I noticed a vent was installed completely crooked and the flashing wasn’t done according to the plan Dean had gone over with us. They sent someone named Mike, who admitted the vent was installed wrong and that “new guys” had been on the job. He replaced the vent and attempted to fix the flashing, but it still wasn’t done correctly.

We contacted the owner, Sarah, who told us the crew would return on Tuesday. They never showed up and never called. She later said they would come on Saturday — again, no show and no communication. Both times I had to reach out, not the other way around. When I expressed how disappointed we were with the delays and lack of communication, she didn’t acknowledge or respond at all.

Several weeks later, workers finally came back and corrected the flashing in two spots at the front of the house. However, a week later I realized the back of the house still had a section of flashing that should have been updated to match the front, but wasn’t. At this point, after so many missed appointments and having to inspect every detail myself, I simply don’t have the energy to contact them again. The caulking was also messy, especially around the chimney.

Overall, this job required far too much oversight, follow-up, and chasing on my part. I’m surprised they have such a high rating. Based on the workmanship, communication, and the amount of effort required from me to get even basic things corrected, I would not recommend this company — although Dean himself was excellent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Artem Grigoryants","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJU7tGtqhJAkjeYQin3ypCMdGvdVExz7_GhPFCbg58Bqa5dsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had the pleasure of working with Principal Roofing & Exterior Contractors on a comprehensive renovation project for our 1920s house. The scope of our project included replacing old stucco with siding on three exterior walls, addressing our roof with new plywood, additional attic insulation, vents, and shingles, and setting up a new eavestrough system while replacing all the aluminum around the exterior. Sara, our project coordinators, played a pivotal role in ensuring the project's success. First and foremost, the level of professionalism displayed by the Principal Roofing team was truly impressive. From the initial consultation to the final cleanup, they demonstrated a strong commitment to customer satisfaction. Their friendly and knowledgeable staff patiently addressed all my questions and concerns, ensuring I was well-informed throughout the entire process.
The quality of their workmanship is second to none. The roofing crew arrived promptly, fully equipped and materials. The craftsmanship displayed during the replacement process was exceptional. Every shingle was installed with precision and care, resulting in a roof that not only looks stunning but also provides reliable protection for years to come.

What impressed me the most about Principal Roofing Company was their commitment to transparency and integrity. They provided a detailed and itemized estimate, outlining all the costs involved, and there were no hidden fees or surprises along the way. The project was completed within the agreed-upon timeframe, and the final invoice matched the initial quote. Such honesty and fairness are rare to find in today's business world, and it sets Principal Roofing apart from the rest.

Furthermore, the company's dedication to safety was evident throughout the entire project. The crew adhered to strict safety protocols, ensuring a secure work environment for themselves and my family. They also took great care to protect my property, using tarps and barriers to prevent any damage or debris from affecting my yard or landscaping.
Lastly, the cleanup process was thorough and meticulous. Principal Roofing left my property in pristine condition. It was clear that they take pride in their work and respect their customers' homes.

In conclusion, I cannot recommend Principal Roofing Company highly enough. Their exceptional service, unparalleled workmanship, and unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction make them the epitome of a five-star roofing company. If you are in need of roofing repairs or replacement, do not hesitate to hire Principal Roofing. You will not be disappointed.

Thank you Sara and Clay for everything 😊

Eddie Q

We worked with Arash at Summit Contractors on the remodel of our master bath and powder room and had an incredible experience. So when it came time to renovate our kitchen it was a no brainer to go with them again!

We contracted them to repaint our whole house, replace our kitchen cabinetry, countertops, and all the fixtures in the kitchen.

We have worked with several other contractors throughout the years and Arash remains the best by far. He prices competitively and accurately with no surprises. His communication is top notch as well as advice. He’s always honest about the pros and cons of your potential choices and makes sure you’re fully informed on prices before you make any decision and will go to bat for you to ensure you get the most competitive price with the best work possible.

Also we all know how long renovations can drag on but that’s simply not the case with Arash. He was 100% accurate with timelines and the renovation finished exactly when he said it would.  And when I made any changes, he always accurately quoted how long they would extend the timeline by.

All of the vendors that Summit employed were exceptionally professional and kind and the quality of their work is top notch. Special mention should be made of Arash’s cabinet maker and kitchen designer, Anne at Fengfa Cabinets, who was an absolute dream to work with.

I will not hesitate to work with Summit again for any future work and will continue to highly recommend them to any of our friends!

PREVIOUS REVIEW ON BATHROOM RENOVATION:
We're in a pretty typical 1800's Toronto city townhome in which every part of it had been renovated at different points in time, so it's just a mish mash of styles with no cohesion.  Therefore we've been on a journey to try and bring a more cohesive, vintage modern style to the townhome and we couldn't have asked for better partners than Summit Contractors for our master bath and powder room renovation!

Despite several add ons from me after the project had started, they were still able to finish within the original timeline.  Additionally, any time I had an add on Arash was able to accurately and clearly communicate any additional cost it may incur so there were zero surprises during the process.  Arash also had an eye for customization and made sure that everything down to the shower head height was exactly what we wanted!

The entire team was quick and efficient while working and I think it's worth mentioning that they had no issues navigating parking or working in a busy, downtown Toronto area as we've had several contractors refuse to work with us given our location.

Also, due to health issues, I was unable to travel to pick out supplies for the renovations.  So all of Summit's vendors had no problem doing phone and Facetime consultations with me to accommodate me.

We've been through several renovations and contractors in the past and the attention to detail and quality of Summit's work is definitely the best we've seen.  Cannot recommend Arash and his team more and we hope to use them again for our kitchen renovation!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB8aPw6gE&fid=0x0:0xb78c74aee8086b0"],"When":"2023-1-22"},{"Name":"Steve H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVN1wIFkNMfAvbtVA0OUeA3yNXtLSp6S10kG7FMAGaRUACjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are no words to describe how pleased we are with Arash's work on our complete main floor renovation. Despite this being my wife's and my first major renovation — and having only heard horror stories from others — I'm very happy to say our experience was smooth sailing throughout, with our final cost matching our expectations, and the results exceeding our expectations. When slight surprises were discovered, Arash offered immediate assurances of finding cost-effective solutions (and came through every time) and was upfront and transparent about any additional costs that were incurred during the two-month process — none of which turned out to be significant.

Arash uses a familiar team of plumbers, electricians, tilers, and painters who all treated the project (as well as our home) with the same level of care and dedication as Arash himself. His team was especially diligent about keeping work areas as clear as possible, and would regularly sweep up at the end of each workday.

We are thrilled with the outcome of the project and the quality of all the work performed, and would happily hire Arash and his team again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICej-DMSQ&fid=0x0:0xb78c74aee8086b0"],"When":"2022-9-26"},{"Name":"Denny Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1ciyzg0Q1MLgyCa0C_n25oncMAgRoFiekD4vZXMummkvhtw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Master Bedroom Ensuite Renovation

Arash and his team did a phenomenal job with our washroom renovation! My wife and I are extremely happy with the outcome. If you don't have time to read my full review here are the 5 main points.

1. Arash and his crew are amazing and my wife and I highly recommend them
2. High quality workmanship
3. Arash keeps his word and is a true professional
4. Arash is fair with his prices
5. Arash actually does care about making his clients happy

Initial Impression
I found Arash on Homestar and we had several meetings with him to discuss various ideas. I like to use these meetings to gauge the other person. Last thing I want is someone who is in it only for the money rather than making their clients happy. What stood out about Arash was he was on time and made some great suggestions that we probably would have never thought of on our own. Based on his level of interest, professionalism, honesty and my gut instincts that he’s a trustworthy guy we went ahead to hire him.

Demolition
During the demolition phase Arash and his crew were very respectful of our home. What distinguished them was they made the effort to protect our floors and stairs with a high quality product. I don't recall the name of the product but it was blue and was designed to be waterproof and protect against any heavy items dropping on the floor. It definitely wasn't the cheap paper covers that i’ve seen some contractors use in the past. I also liked how they cleaned up after each day despite the master bedroom not being occupied. By doing this choir, it did make me feel like they didn’t treat my home like a job site.

Creating Our New Washroom
This was probably one of the most exciting parts of our project. Once we saw them starting to build our new washroom it became easier to envision the entire layout. The first thing that comes to mind that stood out about Arash and his team was they were always thinking ahead. This allowed them to give us some options and make recommendations. The reason this is important to me is I have limited knowledge about this field so to have someone present me the options and answer my questions that meant a lot to me. For example, presenting us the two best options for waterproofing in the shower.
A good example of Arash and his team thinking ahead is when they helped us run a new water line from our water tank into the new washroom. This allowed us to have a direct source of hot and cold water vs borrowing from the washroom next door. I loved how he took the initiative to get this done for us despite us never talking about it before.
At the end of each day, my wife and I would take a look at the progress of our washroom and we really liked the workmanship of their team. No shortcuts were taken. This was one of our fears after watching all these shows on HGTV. I am glad Summit Contractors takes pride in their work.

Final Touches
The final piece of work was installing a barn door for us. It wasn’t a straightforward process due to our wall. Again, Arash thought outside of the box and came up with a brilliant idea to ensure the barn door did not damage our wall and also creatively added stoppers where required. My wife is extremely happy with her new barn door!

Towards the end of the project Arash made sure everything that he had originally promised us was done. He had a check list and went through each item ensuring we both agreed. He definitely kept his word from start to finish.

Recommendation
My wife and I highly recommend Arash and his team at Summit Contractors. High quality work, fair prices, Arash keeps his word and he works to make his customers happy. His team is truly fantastic. Special shout out to the team -> Sohrab, Amir, Ash, Peyman and a couple of others names I cant remember. Bottom line is if you are looking for someone for your next project, make sure to call Summit Contractors!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDCh6W_pwE&fid=0x0:0xb78c74aee8086b0"],"When":"2020-10-14"},{"Name":"Nicholas Sharratt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXO4SdfN_FFxVFWnV0tY3ipjd_P7iezJje-TNnsQcNyvC8CnOZoTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Arash and his team are true professionals. If you want a stress-free renovation that is on-time, on-budget and delivers the results you want I would recommend going with Summit. Would recommend them without hesitation, and we will be calling them for our next project.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDivNG_gAE&fid=0x0:0xb78c74aee8086b0"],"When":"2020-11-28"}]

After working with Daniel, I can confidently say — those reviews are absolutely earned.

I contacted multiple highly rated roofing companies in Vaughan regarding an urgent roof leak. I provided detailed information, including drone footage, to help with assessment. Despite their glowing reviews, most companies either sent generic replies, took days to respond, or didn’t follow up at all. Daniel was the only one who replied within hours, scheduled a weekend visit, and showed up exactly when promised.

He was respectful, professional, and extremely well-prepared. Daniel took the time to inspect the roof thoroughly, discuss the issues, and explain the risks of previous poor workmanship — including bare nailing into shingles from a past “repair.” He offered multiple solutions at different price points, and we agreed on a temporary emergency repair to stop the leak and prevent further damage.

The repair was done with care and precision, even though the patch color was different — a necessary step before the full roof replacement we’re planning later this year or next, based on Daniel’s expert advice. He helped us understand that our roof was at the end of its lifespan, and that ongoing patchwork would be economically unsustainable.

What sets Daniel apart is his honesty, communication, and deep knowledge of roofing systems. He reviewed the drone footage, explained everything clearly, and made us feel confident in every decision. His work ethic and business integrity are rare in this industry.

Others have noted the same: Daniel is known for being punctual, transparent, and genuinely invested in doing the job right. He doesn’t upsell — he educates. And unlike companies with hundreds of questionable 5-star reviews, Roofing Stars actually delivers on what they promise.

If you’re looking for emergency roof repair, leak diagnostics, or long-term roofing solutions in Vaughan or the GTA, I highly recommend Roofing Stars.
